channel.title: intro on Nango
channel.description: Recent content in intro on Nango

item.title: From Future Import PeARS, Part - 1
item.description: PeARS (or Peer-to-peer Agent for Reciprocated Search, if you would prefer that) is a distributed search engine project that I got involved with very recently. It is a very interesting and ambitious idea that Aurelie Herbelot thought of, to make searching more secure, accurate and very much user reliant. For an official intro from the skipper herself head over to her blog. What I am trying to share via this post is the current status of the project, where we see PeARS down the road, how much we would love others to look into the project, and what not.

item.title: Rise above the storm, You will find the sunshine!
item.description: I haven’t blogged in the past 2 years. Whenever I thought of blogging, suddenly I realized the topic I want to write about was embarrassingly trivial(not that I used to write about world changing ideas before). Even if somehow I end up making my mind to blog about some random stuff, the next immediate thought would be: ‘Who would care?!’ This made me not blog all this time, which I regret immensely.
